content: Refunds are issued within 30 days of purchase for any unused product. Past 30 days, store credit only.
Standard shipping is 5-7 business days. Express shipping is 2 business days and costs an additional $15.
All electronics carry a 1-year manufacturer warranty. Extended warranty available for 3 years at checkout.
Items can be returned within 14 days in original packaging. Customer pays return shipping unless item was defective.
Production database is Postgres 16 on RDS. Connection pooling via PgBouncer in transaction mode.
Deploys go through GitHub Actions to ECS Fargate. Blue-green rollout with 5-minute soak time.
Application secrets live in AWS Secrets Manager. Never commit credentials. Rotate keys every 90 days.
Ananya's birthday is August 9th. She asked for a telescope this year.
Dentist appointment on July 3rd at Indiranagar clinic. Bring old X-rays. Don't eat beforehand.
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything.

answer: Refunds are issued within 30 days of purchase; after that, store credit only.
Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days; express is 2 business days for an extra $15.
Electronics carry a 1-year manufacturer warranty, extendable to 3 years at checkout.

q: can I return an item after two weeks?
answer: No — returns are only within 14 days in original packaging.
Production uses Postgres 16 on RDS, with PgBouncer connection pooling.

q: how do we ship code to production?
answer: Via GitHub Actions to ECS Fargate, using a blue-green rollout with a 5-minute soak.
In AWS Secrets Manager; credentials are never committed and keys rotate every 90 days.

q: what should I bring to the dentist?
answer: Old X-rays, and don't eat beforehand (appointment July 3rd, Indiranagar clinic).
Refunds within 30 days of purchase; returns within 14 days in original packaging.
